subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up. It would be great to set up a formal conversation to explore potential partnership opportunities.

We can offer the following meeting windows next week:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If one of those works for you, please send over your preferred slot and we’ll take it from there.

I’m not able to share internal contact details or direct phone numbers. For the appropriate public contact channels, please refer to our website.

Best regards,
